 New on GeM 
03

Technical issues were reported by a few sellers in BID/RA participation on the GeM portal during the time frame from 15-May-2026 09:00 AM to 20-May-2026 02:00 PM. Therefore, impacted Bids/RAs (not yet opened) which were scheduled to end during the above-mentioned period shall be extended till 17:00 Hrs on 26-May-2026. Buyers may take note and sellers are advised to participate accordingly. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) are invited to attend a GeM workshop on the Vendor Assessment process to better understand and streamline their Vendor Assessment journey. For details, please check your GeM-registered email inbox. Following the recent system update, some service providers who have not updated their MSE details are being reflected as Non-MSE, including certain MSE bidders who participated in service bids from 4th to 24th February. Buyers are advised to verify the MSE status of such bidders through the “Seek Clarification” option and communicate its decision for MSE status to GeM for correction, if applicable.MSE service providers are requested to re-verify their MSE profile in GeM if they are getting the message that they are not eligible for MSE purchase preference during bid participation A Gentle Reminder: It is reminded that the buyers who have pending or expired GeM orders including SERVICES Orders placed on or before 14 December 2023, and have not closed these orders, will not be able to procure on GeM after 31 march 2026 until the orders are closed using Partial/Complete Order Closure or updated through bulk payment. GeM sellers can now explore expanded market access through the Open Network for Digital Commerce (ONDC) — learn more at https://portal.ondc.org/merchant-registration. Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.
  GeM Outlet Stores  
Saras Ajeevika

Customers Speak

“We wish to express our sincere appreciation for the exceptional commitment displayed by GeM Team in the auctioning of different items at Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences, Lucknow. Continuous assistance and guidance were provided with utmost professionalism and excellence by GeM Team. The achieved price was exceedingly competitive, surpassing our reserved value significantly, an accomplishment that is both impressive and noteworthy. We look forward to utilizing GeM Forward Auction in future as well for disposal of other goods and materials”

Sh. S.B.Singh

STO/ Nodal Officer( GeM Cell) SGPGIMS, Lucknow
